taxonomy: Garuleum sonchifolium is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the clade Eudicots and is further classified within the clade Angiosperms. The plant is also a member of the superorder Asteranae and the order Asterales. Within the family Asteraceae, Garuleum sonchifolium is classified as a part of the subfamily Asteroideae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
